items.quote: I know Max Holloway is as tall as me. Max Holloway is 6'1.

items.claim: Max Holloway is a volume puncher.
items.quote: Max Holloway very much a volume puncher through and through.
Max Holloway, according to Tapology, has a 69 in reach.

items.claim: Max Holloway compensates for his short reach by keeping his hands extended at shoulder level rather than tucked.
items.quote: He kind of keeps his hands shoulder level and he holds them out. That's how he kind of compensates for having a shorter reach
It's crazy to think Max Holloway is only 34 years old.

items.claim: Max Holloway has high-level submission defense.
items.quote: Gotta give Max Holloway's flowers when you talk about the defense

items.claim: Max Holloway is difficult to take down.
items.quote: Max Holloway is not easy to take down
